New User Onboarding

source_name: New User Onboarding

document_type: onboarding

last_updated: 2026-03-10

access_level: internal

Initial setup

New users should accept the invitation email, create a password, and configure MFA before accessing the portal.

Role assignment

Managers request role assignments through the Admin Console. The default role is Viewer. Elevated roles require approval from an account administrator.

First login checklist

Users should verify their profile, timezone, notification preferences, and support contact information during first login.
